resources.string:
The IOU Pinger feature requires Firestore indexes. Please create the following indexes in your Firebase Console:
1. Go to Firebase Console -> Firestore Database -> Indexes 2. Create these composite indexes:
Index 1: - Collection: notifications - Fields: recipientUid (Ascending), type (Ascending), timestamp (Descending)
Index 2: - Collection: notifications - Fields: recipientUid (Ascending), type (Ascending), timestamp (Descending)
Or click the link in the error message to auto-create the indexes.
